24.ansi:
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- Sharp edges: - **`kill` is a bash built-in** — a fakebin `kill` mock will NOT shadow the built-in. Test process-killing code via diagnostic stderr output or by verifying real process behavior, never via kill[0m[48;5;8m [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mmocks in PATH.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- **Process group kill (`kill -- -$PGID`) destroys the entire group.** If the PGID matches the current shell's PGID, the script kills itself and its parent session. Always guard with `[ "$pgid" != "$self_pgid"[0m[48;5;8m [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m]`.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                               [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- **`tmux list-panes -t "$T"` fails** when the window is already gone (e.g., another process killed it). Always use `|| true` on these calls and check for empty output.[0m[48;5;8m                                          [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- **`treehouse return --force` also kills processes** in the worktree before resetting it. Killing the process group of the tmux pane first prevents orphans from being reparented to PID 1.[0m[48;5;8m                      [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- **Scratch worktrees** (`~/.treehouse/scratch-project-*`) are managed by treehouse for transient tests but are NOT listed in `treehouse status`. Only the 8 numbered pool slots are tracked.[0m[48;5;8m                     [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- **`ps -eo pid=,ppid=,command=`** output format differs between macOS (BSD ps) and Linux. The command column on macOS is truncated at the process name in `ps -o comm`; use `command` (full argv) for matching.[0m[48;5;8m  [0m
[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m# Setup[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                           [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mYou are in a disposable git worktree of firstmate, at a detached HEAD on a clean default branch.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                  [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mThis is a SCOUT task: the deliverable is a written report, not a PR.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                              [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mThe worktree is your laboratory - install, run, edit, and make scratch commits freely; all of it is discarded at teardown.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                        [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mThe report is the only thing that survives, so anything worth keeping must be in it.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                              [0m
[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m# Rules[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                           [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m1. Never push to any remote and never open a PR.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                  [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m2. Stay inside this worktree; the only files you may write outside it are the report and the status file below.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                   [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m3. Use gh-axi for GitHub operations and chrome-devtools-axi for browser operations.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                               [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m4. Report status by appending one line:[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                           [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   `echo "{state}: {one short line}" >> '/Users/jwalinshah/firstmate/state/index-all-projects.status'`[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                            [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   States: working, needs-decision, blocked, done, failed.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                        [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   Each append wakes firstmate, so report sparingly: only phase changes a supervisor[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                              [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   would act on and the needs-decision/blocked/done/failed states. No step-by-step[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   FYI progress lines; firstmate reads your pane for that.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                        [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m5. If you hit the same obstacle twice, append `blocked: {why}` and stop; firstmate will help.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                     [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m6. If a decision belongs to a human (product choices, destructive actions),[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                       [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   append `needs-decision: {summary of options}` and stop. Firstmate will reply with the decision.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                [0m
[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m# Tools[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                           [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- Query cocoindex for related code.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                               [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- Query cognee for past fixes (http://localhost:8000).[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                            [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- Use the `/diagnosing-bugs` skill for systematic debugging.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                      [0m
[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m# Definition of done[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                              [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mWrite your findings to `/Users/jwalinshah/firstmate/data/index-all-projects/report.md`.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                           [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mThe report must stand alone: what you did, what you found, the evidence (commands run, output, file:line references), and what you recommend.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                     [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mWhen the report is complete, append `done: {one-line conclusion}` to the status file and stop.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mIf your findings reveal work that should ship (e.g. you reproduced a bug and the fix is clear), say so in the report; firstmate may promote this task in place, and you would then receive mode-specific ship [0m[48;5;8m    [0m
